word: G5226 - ὑπείκω - hypeíkō - hoop-i'-ko - Submit self

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ὑπείκω

- Transliteration: Hupeiko

- Phonetic: hoop-i'-ko

- Definition:

1. to resist no longer, but to give way, yield (of combatants)

2. metaph. to yield to authority and admonition, to submit

- Origin: "from G5259 and eiko (to yield, be "weak")"

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G5259 and εἴκω eikō (to yield be weak); to surrender: - submit self.
